subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and this is a Day wherein the Crier hath raised his call from a place near at hand, and wherein hath been made manifest that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و هذا یوم نادی فیه المناد من مکان قریب و فیه ظهر ما
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa]
